Found three differences

  ± value change
    - nginx-1.0.0
    + nginx-1.0.1

spec.replicas  (apps/v1/Deployment/default/nginx)
  ± value change
    - 3
    + 5

spec.template.spec.containers.nginx.image  (apps/v1/Deployment/default/nginx)
  ± value change

    + nginx:1.21
